name: GQA Attention
description: Grouped Query Attention with RoPE — fewer KV heads shared across Q heads (Qwen-style)
code:
_gqa{{_id}}_d = {{dim}}
_gqa{{_id}}_qh = {{n_q_heads}}
_gqa{{_id}}_kvh = {{n_kv_heads}}
_gqa{{_id}}_dk = _gqa{{_id}}_d // _gqa{{_id}}_qh
_gqa{{_id}}_g = _gqa{{_id}}_qh // _gqa{{_id}}_kvh
_gqa{{_id}}_wq = np.random.randn(_gqa{{_id}}_d, _gqa{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_gqa{{_id}}_wk = np.random.randn(_gqa{{_id}}_kvh * _gqa{{_id}}_dk, _gqa{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_gqa{{_id}}_wv = np.random.randn(_gqa{{_id}}_kvh * _gqa{{_id}}_dk, _gqa{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_gqa{{_id}}_wo = np.random.randn(_gqa{{_id}}_d, _gqa{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_gqa{{_id}}_bq = np.zeros(_gqa{{_id}}_d, dtype=np.float32)
_gqa{{_id}}_bk = np.zeros(_gqa{{_id}}_kvh * _gqa{{_id}}_dk, dtype=np.float32)
_gqa{{_id}}_bv = np.zeros(_gqa{{_id}}_kvh * _gqa{{_id}}_dk, dtype=np.float32)
_gqa{{_id}}_bs, _gqa{{_id}}_sl, _ = {{input}}.shape
# Q: full heads, K/V: grouped heads
_gqa{{_id}}_q = (np.matmul({{input}}, _gqa{{_id}}_wq.T) + _gqa{{_id}}_bq).reshape(_gqa{{_id}}_bs, _gqa{{_id}}_sl, _gqa{{_id}}_qh, _gqa{{_id}}_dk).transpose(0, 2, 1, 3)
_gqa{{_id}}_k = (np.matmul({{input}}, _gqa{{_id}}_wk.T) + _gqa{{_id}}_bk).reshape(_gqa{{_id}}_bs, _gqa{{_id}}_sl, _gqa{{_id}}_kvh, _gqa{{_id}}_dk).transpose(0, 2, 1, 3)
_gqa{{_id}}_v = (np.matmul({{input}}, _gqa{{_id}}_wv.T) + _gqa{{_id}}_bv).reshape(_gqa{{_id}}_bs, _gqa{{_id}}_sl, _gqa{{_id}}_kvh, _gqa{{_id}}_dk).transpose(0, 2, 1, 3)
# RoPE
_gqa{{_id}}_freqs = 1.0 / ({{theta}} ** (np.arange(0, _gqa{{_id}}_dk, 2, dtype=np.float32) / _gqa{{_id}}_dk))
_gqa{{_id}}_pos = np.arange(_gqa{{_id}}_sl, dtype=np.float32)
_gqa{{_id}}_ang = np.outer(_gqa{{_id}}_pos, _gqa{{_id}}_freqs)
_gqa{{_id}}_cos = np.cos(_gqa{{_id}}_ang).astype(np.float32)
_gqa{{_id}}_sin = np.sin(_gqa{{_id}}_ang).astype(np.float32)
_gqa{{_id}}_qr = np.zeros_like(_gqa{{_id}}_q)
_gqa{{_id}}_qr[..., 0::2] = _gqa{{_id}}_q[..., 0::2] * _gqa{{_id}}_cos - _gqa{{_id}}_q[..., 1::2] * _gqa{{_id}}_sin
_gqa{{_id}}_qr[..., 1::2] = _gqa{{_id}}_q[..., 0::2] * _gqa{{_id}}_sin + _gqa{{_id}}_q[..., 1::2] * _gqa{{_id}}_cos
_gqa{{_id}}_kr = np.zeros_like(_gqa{{_id}}_k)
_gqa{{_id}}_kr[..., 0::2] = _gqa{{_id}}_k[..., 0::2] * _gqa{{_id}}_cos - _gqa{{_id}}_k[..., 1::2] * _gqa{{_id}}_sin
_gqa{{_id}}_kr[..., 1::2] = _gqa{{_id}}_k[..., 0::2] * _gqa{{_id}}_sin + _gqa{{_id}}_k[..., 1::2] * _gqa{{_id}}_cos
# Repeat KV heads to match Q heads
_gqa{{_id}}_kr = np.repeat(_gqa{{_id}}_kr, _gqa{{_id}}_g, axis=1)
_gqa{{_id}}_vr = np.repeat(_gqa{{_id}}_v, _gqa{{_id}}_g, axis=1)
# Attention
_gqa{{_id}}_sc = np.matmul(_gqa{{_id}}_qr, _gqa{{_id}}_kr.transpose(0, 1, 3, 2)) / np.sqrt(_gqa{{_id}}_dk)
if {{mask}} is not None:
    _gqa{{_id}}_sc = np.where({{mask}} == 0, -1e9, _gqa{{_id}}_sc)
_gqa{{_id}}_ex = np.exp(_gqa{{_id}}_sc - np.max(_gqa{{_id}}_sc, axis=-1, keepdims=True))
_gqa{{_id}}_aw = _gqa{{_id}}_ex / np.sum(_gqa{{_id}}_ex, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
_gqa{{_id}}_av = np.matmul(_gqa{{_id}}_aw, _gqa{{_id}}_vr)
{{output}} = np.matmul(_gqa{{_id}}_av.transpose(0, 2, 1, 3).reshape(_gqa{{_id}}_bs, _gqa{{_id}}_sl, _gqa{{_id}}_d), _gqa{{_id}}_wo.T)
